# @codenhub/kbd

> Experimental page-wide and target-scoped keyboard shortcut registration for
> browser applications.

Matching uses exact modifiers. Registration owns DOM listeners, so unregister
bindings or clear their `Keyboard` instance during teardown.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Purpose, status, and starting points.
- [API, matching, and lifecycle](docs/reference.md): Complete exports, options,
  errors, SSR, cleanup, and accessibility.
